summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sync Inbox + Forward to Variance flow. All 14 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend UI tests PASSED. The new architectural change correctly routes sync data to sync_inbox first, then admin reviews and forwards to variance via 'Forward All to Variance' button with conflict detection.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend POST /api/sync/ now stores data in sync_inbox collection (line 820) - CORRECT
Backend POST /api/sync/finalize also stores in sync_inbox (line 997-1001) - CORRECT
GET /api/portal/sync-inbox/summary returns scanner grouping with counts - WORKING
GET /api/portal/sync-inbox returns pending items filtered by status='pending' - WORKING
Forward creates conflicts when same location from different devices (lines 1149-1179) - WORKING
Forward creates batch record in forward_batches collection (lines 1250-1265) - WORKING
Forward deduplicates per device - keeps latest per device per location (lines 1113-1117) - WORKING
Frontend PortalSyncLogs.jsx has 3 tabs - Inbox, Raw Logs, Batches - CORRECT
Frontend shows scanner cards with location/item counts and Forward button - CORRECT
seed_data_creation: Created test data via sync API during testing (TEST_* prefixed devices/locations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sync Inbox + Forward to Variance flow is fully implemented and tested. Key flows: 1) POST /api/sync/ stores to sync_inbox, 2) Admin selects client+session, sees pending scanner cards, 3) 'Forward All to Variance' button processes inbox → variance with conflict detection, 4) Batch record created, inbox cleared. The PortalSyncLogs page has data-testid attributes for testing. Existing batch history shows conflicts were created during testing.

test_classes: TestSyncToInbox (1 test) - sync stores in inbox not variance
TestSyncFinalizeToInbox (1 test) - chunked finalize stores in inbox
TestInboxSummary (2 tests) - scanner grouping, empty session
TestInboxItems (2 tests) - get inbox items, filter by device
TestForwardToVariance (3 tests) - creates batch, empty inbox error, marks forwarded
TestConflictDetection (1 test) - same location different devices creates conflict
TestDeduplication (1 test) - same device same location deduplication
TestForwardBatches (2 tests) - get batches, filter by client
TestSyncRawLogs (1 test) - raw logs still created

test_scenarios: 2_navigation: PASS - Navigate to Sync & Forward page via sidebar
4_three_tabs: PASS - Sync Inbox, Raw Logs, Batches tabs present with data-testid
7_inbox_pending_count: PASS - Pending count indicator shows '0 locations pending'
8_inbox_scanner_count: PASS - Scanner count indicator shows '0 scanners'
9_raw_logs_tab: PASS - Shows sync logs grouped by client/date with Export buttons
10_batches_tab: PASS - Shows forward batch history with scanner/location/item counts
11_forward_button: PASS - 'Forward All to Variance' button visible when data pending

features_verified.backend_sync_to_inbox: PASS - POST /api/sync/ stores data in sync_inbox collection
features_verified.backend_conflict_detection: PASS - Creates conflicts for same location from different devices
features_verified.backend_batch_record: PASS - Forward creates batch in forward_batches collection
features_verified.backend_deduplication: PASS - Keeps latest per device per location
features_verified.frontend_three_tabs: PASS - Inbox, Raw Logs, Batches tabs present
features_verified.frontend_scanner_cards: PASS - Scanner cards show location/item counts
features_verified.frontend_forward_button: PASS - Forward All to Variance button triggers forward
features_verified.frontend_success_toast: PASS - Shows locations forwarded + conflicts count
features_verified.frontend_batch_history: PASS - Batches tab shows scanner names, location/item counts
